model._hint: Fine-tune: ogkalu/Comic-Diffusion v2 (SD 1.5 base). All 6 comic styles trained simultaneously. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 20–30 steps. 25 is a good default. More steps rarely improve comic-style outputs. | CFG 7–8 recommended. Higher values increase style adherence but reduce prompt flexibility. | SD 1.5 native 512×512. 768×512 works for landscape compositions.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates comic illustrations in the style of Charlie Bo — clean geometric shapes, bold outlines, and vibrant flat colours reminiscent of modern graphic novels and European comics.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: 'charliebo artstyle' must appear in every prompt. Examples: 'a superhero in action, charliebo artstyle', 'street scene at night, charliebo artstyle', 'close-up portrait of a spy, charliebo artstyle'.
